title: PR scope and sequencing for #17 round 3
context: User asked to fix #17 fully. 15 Windows test failures remain on main: ~13 are path-normalization (same pattern as #30 and #33), 2 are non-path bugs (patterns.test.ts Map ordering, lane-runner.test.ts custom-workflow return value). Need to choose how to split the work into PR(s).

options.label: One PR: all path fixes + both non-path bugs together
Two PRs: paths first, then 2 bugs
Three PRs: path sweep, patterns bug, lane-runner bug
Paths only; file separate issues for the bugs

rationale: User prefers single PR for full #17 closure.
